meta.title: Paw Tag | The companion safety and wellness ecosystem
meta.description: Protect your companion with Paw Tag. Access their location, medical history, and digital documents instantly. Join the community of responsible owners.

hero.subtitle: It's not just a collar. It's a digital passport connecting medical history, location, and your unconditional love in a single tap.

beneficios.subtitle: An ecosystem designed from respect and love, providing peace of mind in every moment of the day.
beneficios.card1_desc: Whoever finds your companion only needs to bring their phone close to see your contact and location.
beneficios.card2_desc: Vaccines, allergies, and treatments instantly accessible for any veterinary emergency.
beneficios.card3_desc: Forget paperwork. Carry registration, insurance, and travel certificates in your pocket.
beneficios.card4_desc: Connect with other responsible owners, discover pet-friendly parks, and receive neighborhood alerts.

como_funciona.subtitle: Advanced technology, designed to be intuitive.
como_funciona.step1_desc: Receive your smart tag with exclusive Paw Tag design.
como_funciona.step2_desc: Bring your phone close to the tag and create your companion's profile for free.
como_funciona.step3_desc: Place it on their collar. Their vital information is now protected.

veterinarias.title: Do you own a pet-related business?
veterinarias.subtitle: Join the official Paw Tag network. Clinics, hospitals, pet shops, grooming salons, daycares, and walkers: offer your clients the most advanced identification and give an added value to your services.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: We answer your questions about the Paw Tag ecosystem.
faq.a1: Paw Tag goes far beyond a simple tracker; it's a complete ecosystem for responsible owners. In addition to tracking technology via a "Proximity Network" (similar to other high-end trackers), it includes a complete digital medical passport. From a single app, you can manage your companion's clinical history, save important documents, and connect with an active community, all designed from love and respect for their well-being.
faq.q2: How do I link my account?
faq.a2: The process is very intuitive and takes less than a couple of minutes. You just need to download our free mobile app and create your companion's digital profile. Then, simply bring your phone close to the physical tag for the NFC technology to detect it instantly. The tag and the app will be linked immediately.
faq.q3: Does it work on any type of phone?
faq.a3: Yes, the ecosystem is designed to be fully accessible. Scanning the tag works with any modern smartphone (iOS or Android) that has an integrated NFC reader. Whoever finds your companion does not need to have the app installed to read the tag and contact you.
faq.q4: Do I need to recharge the Paw Tag medal battery?
faq.a4: No, you won't have to worry about cables or remembering to charge it every week. Paw Tag works with a standard replaceable watch battery that lasts approximately one year. When it runs out, you can easily replace it yourself at a very low cost.
faq.q5: What exactly happens when someone scans my companion's tag?
faq.a5: If your companion ever gets lost, the person who finds them only needs to bring their phone close to the medal. Doing so will instantly open an emergency screen in their browser (potentially even showing a video of you giving instructions), displaying only your essential contact information and urgent medical data to facilitate a quick and safe return home.

footer.brand_desc: Comprehensive care from love and respect for those who bring joy to our lives.
footer.geo: 📍 Available in all Mexico. Soon all over LATAM.

activar.meta_desc: Link your Paw Tag quickly to start protecting your companion's vital information.

activar.video_desc: Learn step-by-step how to download the app, save your pet's data to the NFC chip, and link to Apple and Google tracking networks.

manual.meta_desc: Setup instructions, usage, and frequently asked questions for the Paw Tag Loshall model.
manual.title: User Manual
manual.subtitle: Quick guide to set up your Paw Tag
manual.model_note: These instructions are exclusive to the Loshall model. If you have a different model, consult its specific manual.
manual.android_req: Compatible only with Android 9+. Does not support Huawei devices.
manual.locked_note: Once paired with a device, the item is linked to that account.
manual.ios_step1_desc: Quickly press and release the button; you will hear a sound indicating it is on.
manual.ios_step2_desc: Open the Find My app. Go to 'Items' > '+ Add Item' > 'Add Other Item'. Bring it close to your iPhone and tap 'Connect'. Name your Tag and select an emoji.
manual.ios_step3_desc: In the app, select your Tag and tap 'Enable' under 'Lost Mode'. Enter a phone number/email and a message (e.g., 'Help my dog get home').
manual.ios_step4_desc: In 'Items', select your Tag, tap 'Remove Item' and confirm. Note: The Tag won't shut down entirely; it will enter pairing mode for 10 mins.
manual.android_prep: Preparation: Turn on Bluetooth and cell/internet network. Press and hold the button for 3 seconds. Open your phone settings.
manual.android_pair: Fast Pair: Bring the Tag close to your Android device and wait for the pop-up window. (If it fails, restart phone and try again).
manual.android_config: Setup: Tap 'Connect' and accept the prompts. In the Find Hub app, assign a name and category to your Paw Tag.
manual.android_manual: Manual Setup: If you miss the pop-up: Settings > Google > All Services > Connected Devices > Devices > Enable 'Scan for Nearby Devices' > Tap the item in the list.
manual.btn_on: Power On: Press and hold for about 3 seconds. It will make a sound indicating it's turned on.
manual.btn_off: Power Off: Quickly press the button twice, then press and hold the button for 3 seconds.
manual.btn_status: Confirm Status: Double-click. If it beeps, it's working. If not, it is powered off (press for 3s to turn on).
manual.btn_reset: Factory Reset: 1) Remove the Tag from the app settings. 2) Quickly press the button 4 times, then press and hold for 3 seconds.
manual.feat_locate: Locate Globally: Trackable via hundreds of millions of devices worldwide anonymously (Apple Find My) or via Find Hub.
manual.feat_sound: Play Sound: Use the app (Find My or Find Hub) to make the Tag beep if your pet is hiding nearby.
manual.feat_alerts: Separation Alerts: Enable 'Notify When Left Behind' to get an alert when your phone loses Bluetooth connection with the Tag.
manual.feat_simultaneous: Exclusive Modes: Works on the Apple network OR the Google network, but NOT simultaneously. Activating one disables the other.
manual.tip_network: If pairing fails due to network/server issues, try toggling your phone's Wi-Fi and Cellular Data.
manual.tip_timeout: Pairing Timeout: Removed devices enter 'pairing state'. If not paired within 10 minutes, they exit this state. Press 3s to wake it up again.
manual.tip_reset: If the tag doesn't connect, try the Alternative Factory Reset: While on, press the button 5 times, holding it down on the 5th press until a tune plays.
manual.faq_privacy_a: Only you can see where your item is. Location data and history are never stored on the physical tag; the whole network is encrypted and anonymous.
manual.faq_tracking_q: How does it discourage unwanted tracking?
manual.faq_tracking_a: Both networks feature anti-stalking alerts. If an unknown Tag separated from its owner moves with you over time, your phone will notify you or the Tag will beep.
manual.faq_distance_q: What is the range or distance of the Paw Tag?
manual.faq_distance_a:
The Paw Tag has no maximum distance limit! Its technology protects your pet on three levels:

Global Range: It uses the "Find network" (Apple/Google). If your pet wanders off, any nearby smartphone will silently update its location on your map securely and anonymously.
Short Range (Up to 15m): If nearby, use Bluetooth to make the tag ring and find them quickly.
Contact Range (NFC): If someone finds them, they just need to scan the tag with their phone to view your emergency contact.
manual.warning_choking: Choking and Chemical Burn Hazard (CR2032): Contains a coin cell battery.
manual.warning_kids: Keep spare batteries, small parts, and the battery compartment away from young children. If the compartment doesn't close securely, stop using it.
manual.warning_medical: Do not ingest the battery. If ingestion is suspected, seek medical attention IMMEDIATELY; it can cause severe chemical burns or death in 2 hours.
